subject: session date
fact: The evening ended with a telepathic message arriving for Akritas.
source_quote: The evening ended with a telepathic message arriving for Akritas

subject: Emerald Enclave
fact: The Emerald Enclave sent a telepathic message to Akritas.
source_quote: a telepathic message arriving for Akritas from the Emerald Enclave

subject: fire giants
fact: Fire giants control the Underdark city of Szith Morcane.
source_quote: fire giants controlling the Underdark city of Szith Morcane

subject: Szith Morcane
fact: Szith Morcane is an Underdark city.
source_quote: the Underdark city of Szith Morcane

subject: giants' target shift
fact: The fire giants have turned their eyes toward the Dalelands and Hillsfar.
source_quote: had turned their eyes toward the surface — toward the Dalelands and Hillsfar itself

subject: brain-capped mushrooms
fact: The brain-capped mushrooms are holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness.
source_quote: The brain-capped mushrooms the party had secured were holding back the worst of Graz'zt's madness

subject: Drow resistance
fact: The Drow resistance is led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv.
source_quote: Drow resistance led by the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: Murssvayas Dhuurniv
fact: Murssvayas Dhuurniv is a wizard.
source_quote: the wizard Murssvayas Dhuurniv

subject: party mission
fact: The party was called to travel to Szith Morcane to stop the giants.
source_quote: The party was called to travel to Szith Morcane... and stop the giants

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz gave a dry-witted farewell to the party.
source_quote: Well, I hope I never meet you again. But if you do, I know it'll be because you're planning to save me.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz is a drow.
source_quote: from the drow the party rescued

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought severed his own tentacles.
source_quote: severed his own tentacles

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought plane shifted away to another dimension.
source_quote: plane shifted away to another dimension

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought was reduced to near death.
source_quote: Rogue Thought, reduced to near death

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought is a Mind Flayer.
source_quote: The Mind Flayer escaped rather than face destruction

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought delivered an ominous greeting while sipping from a brain jar.
source_quote: The mad Mind Flayer's ominous greeting to the party, delivered while casually sipping from a brain jar

subject: Rogue Thought
fact: Rogue Thought vowed revenge.
source_quote: leaving behind only a vow of revenge from himself and Graz'zt

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur positioned a fireball to catch the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: Felkur carefully positioned a fireball to catch the Mind Flayer and nearly every Githyanki warrior in the blast

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana delivered a thinly veiled threat over a fine dinner.
source_quote: Isthana's thinly veiled threat delivered with a smile over a fine dinner

subject: Isthana
fact: Isthana implied business would not be good without her patronage.
source_quote: Any business that was not under my patronage — well, I wouldn't say anything bad would happen, but business would not be good.

subject: Arrizz
fact: Arrizz was bound and tormented by Githyanki warriors.
source_quote: The party discovers Arrizz bound and tormented by Githyanki warriors

subject: Daein
fact: Daein led an assault against the Githyanki.
source_quote: Daein leads an assault against the Githyanki

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim provided spectral guardians to support the assault.
source_quote: supported by Bramgrim's spectral guardians

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas provided archery support during the assault.
source_quote: and Akritas's archery

subject: Githyanki knight
fact: A Githyanki knight vanished using planar magic.
source_quote: A Githyanki knight vanishes using planar magic

subject: Githyanki knight
fact: The Githyanki knight warned the party they had made a permanent enemy.
source_quote: after warning the party they have made a permanent enemy

subject: Arrizz freed
fact: The party freed Arrizz.
source_quote: The party frees Arrizz

subject: Arrizz cured
fact: The party cured Arrizz's demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom.
source_quote: and cures his demonic madness using a piece of magical mushroom

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum is an unconscious Duergar.
source_quote: Thera Grabelthum, an unconscious Duergar

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum is revealed to be a Zhentarim spy.
source_quote: revealed under intimidation to be a Zhentarim spy

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum turned invisible.
source_quote: while Thera turns invisible

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum attempted to flee.
source_quote: attempts to flee

subject: Thera Grabelthum
fact: Thera Grabelthum was killed during the chaos.
source_quote: Thera is killed during the chaos

subject: Githyanki warriors
fact: Two Githyanki warriors ambushed the party from the muck.
source_quote: Two Githyanki warriors ambush the party from the muck

subject: intellect devourer
fact: An intellect devourer emerged from a slain warrior's skull.
source_quote: An intellect devourer emerges from a slain warrior's skull

subject: intellect devourer
fact: The intellect devourer stunned the Owlbear with a devastating psychic blast.
source_quote: stuns the Owlbear with a devastating psychic blast

subject: intellect devourer
fact: Felkur destroyed the intellect devourer with a firebolt.
source_quote: Felkur destroys the intellect devourer with a firebolt

subject: Githyanki warrior
fact: Felkur damaged a Githyanki warrior with a firebolt.
source_quote: and damages a Githyanki warrior

subject: Githyanki warrior
fact: Daein and Akritas coordinated to finish off the remaining Githyanki warrior.
source_quote: Daein and Akritas coordinate to finish off the remaining Githyanki warrior

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear was stunned and helpless.
source_quote: left the Owlbear stunned and helpless

subject: Owlbear
fact: Bramgrim healed the injured and unconscious Owlbear after combat.
source_quote: Bramgrim heals the injured and unconscious Owlbear after the combat ends

subject: Mind Flayer's lair
fact: The party battles in a rogue Mind Flayer's lair.
source_quote: in a rogue Mind Flayer's lair

subject: opals
fact: The party found two opals.
source_quote: finding two opals

subject: circlet
fact: The party found a valuable circlet.
source_quote: a valuable circlet

subject: gold coins
fact: The party found a chainmail pouch of gold coins.
source_quote: a chainmail pouch of gold coins

subject: freezing chamber
fact: The party entered a room kept at a much cooler temperature by columns of ice.
source_quote: a room kept at a much cooler temperature by columns of ice

subject: block of opaque ice
fact: The room contained a large block of opaque ice with suspended brains.
source_quote: containing a large block of opaque ice with suspended brains

subject: vials of yellowish liquid
fact: The room contained small vials of yellowish liquid.
source_quote: small vials of yellowish liquid

subject: otherworldly symbols
fact: The room contained strange otherworldly symbols.
source_quote: and strange otherworldly symbols

subject: copper plate
fact: The group discovered a hidden copper plate emblazoned with symbols.
source_quote: They discover a hidden copper plate emblazoned with symbols on one side

subject: chest
fact: The group suspected a chest was trapped.
source_quote: discusses a chest they suspect is trapped

subject: chest bypass
fact: The group decided to bypass the chest since they had enough brains.
source_quote: ultimately deciding to bypass it since they already have enough brains to open the sealed doors

subject: short rest
fact: The party took a short rest to recover their strength and heal the Owlbear.
source_quote: The party takes a short rest to recover their strength and heal the Owlbear

subject: door entry
fact: The party coordinated placing brains at each of the magically sealed doors to gain entry.
source_quote: They coordinate placing brains at each of the magically sealed doors to gain entry to the central chamber
